title: Support {...}[]
body:
The following code does not compile and verilator gives me an error of unsupported syntax:
```verilog
{32'(a) << 32'h2}[7:0];
```
I checked the code and found that the error is injected in V3LinkResolve.cpp:230. I actually found similar pattern (i.e., selection of a  shift operation) in the AST optimized by verilator, and if I comment Line 230-233 verilator can parse the code. Is there any specific reason why this language feature is unsupported?
